mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) above 150k indicates robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals strong aggregate demand, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of GDPC1 and INDPRO fails to produce positive 20d returns in 50%+ of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) above 2.5% triggers central bank tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as bond yields rise.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5, or the signal's IC falls below -0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts (HOUST) below 1000k signals weak demand for construction, reducing corporate revenues and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where HOUST falls below 1000, or the signal's IC exceeds -0.03 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Slowing industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 indicates reduced manufacturing activity, lowering corporate earnings and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below 100, or the signal's IC exceeds -0.04 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in unemployment (UNRATE) and rising payroll growth (PAYEMS) indicate tight labor markets, pushing inflation higher and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline in UNRATE and growth in PAYEMS fails to produce negative 20d returns in 50%+ of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient becomes insignificant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit (RSAFS) above 430 billion signals increased household spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where RSAFS exceeds 430000, or the signal's IC drops below 0.04 in rolling 3-year windows.
